<!-- Thanks for contributing! Fill in the sections below. -->

## What & why

<!-- Short description of the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #42"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement
- [ ] Docs / sample / template change
- [ ] Localization (resx) change

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (production)
- [ ] `npm test` is green
- [ ] Manifest `version` bumped if the control was changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the Unreleased section
- [ ] If a manifest property was added or renamed: `npm run refreshTypes` was run
- [ ] If a public string was added/changed: all 7 resx files updated (1033 EN as the source of truth)

## Screenshots (if UI affecting)
